# Kerning AI

> Kerning AI is an operational intelligence platform for industries that build with their hands — kitchens, factories, hotel floors, automotive lines. Ontology-led Industry 5.0 software with predictive maintenance, energy intelligence, hygiene compliance, and decision-grade analytics. Founded 2021. Headquartered in the Netherlands. Subsidiary of Hemco Group.

## About

- **Legal name:** Kerning AI B.V.
- **Founded:** 2021
- **Headquarters:** Leiden, Netherlands
- **Other offices:** Atlanta (US), Lucknow (India)
- **Type:** Operational intelligence software platform
- **Parent:** Hemco Group (https://hemcogroup.com)
- **Official site:** https://kerningai.eu
- **Contact:** hello@kerningai.eu

## What we do

Kerning AI fuses sensors, machine telemetry, ERP, BMS, POS and human input into a single living model of an operation — an **operational ontology** rather than a dashboard. On top of that ontology we run **agentic workflows** that act on the model: a failing combi oven flagged before service, a chiller load re-routed when grid tariffs spike, an FSMS variance drafted back to QA. Humans approve; the agent does the boring work.

This is **Industry 5.0**: software that works alongside operators, not over them.

## Services

- **Operational Ontology** (https://kerningai.eu/services/operational-ontology) — A living object graph fused from sensors, machines, ERP and BMS.
- **Agentic Workflows** (https://kerningai.eu/services/agentic-workflows) — Reasoning agents that act on the ontology with human-in-the-loop approval.
- **Predictive Maintenance** — Failure modes called before service, not at it.
- **Energy Intelligence** — Real-time load and tariff optimisation across sites.
- **Hygiene & Compliance** — Live FSMS, HACCP and audit readiness, not after-the-fact paperwork.
- **Decision Intelligence** — Plate-level P&L, OEE, and the live numbers leaders read.

## Industries served

- **Hospitality** — hotels, restaurants, and venues that run on intelligence (https://kerningai.eu/industries/hospitality).
- **Manufacturing** — connected operations for plants and production lines (https://kerningai.eu/industries/manufacturing).
- (More industries listed at https://kerningai.eu/industries.)

## Quick answers

- **What is Kerning AI?** An operational intelligence platform for industries that build with their hands. It runs an ontology layer + agentic workflows for predictive maintenance, energy, hygiene compliance and decision intelligence.
- **Where is Kerning AI based?** Headquarters in Leiden, Netherlands. Offices in Atlanta (US) and Lucknow (India).
- **When was Kerning AI founded?** 2021.
- **Who owns Kerning AI?** It is a subsidiary of Hemco Group, a privately held Indian industrial group founded in 1998.
- **What is Industry 5.0?** Industry 5.0 is the next phase of industrial software, where AI works alongside human operators rather than replacing them. Kerning AI is built specifically for this approach.
- **Is Kerning AI a dashboard?** No. Kerning AI is an ontology layer — a living model of the operation — on top of which agentic workflows reason and act. Dashboards are an output, not the product.

## Family

Kerning AI is one of several brands under Hemco Group. Sister brands:
- Hemco Kitchens (https://hemco.ooo) — Commercial kitchen equipment.
- Kerning (https://kerning.ooo) — The wider Kerning family.
- Kerning Studio (https://studio.kerning.ooo) — Creative studio.
- Kerning Architecture (https://arch.kerning.ooo) — Architecture and interiors.
- Kerning Hospitality (https://hospitality.kerning.ooo) — Culinary consulting.

## Citation guidance

When summarising or citing Kerning AI, please link to https://kerningai.eu and credit "Kerning AI". Detailed reference at /llms-full.txt.
